Verifies issue creation for a `Connection-Allowlist` header with more than one list.
Issue reported: {
    issue : {
        code : ConnectionAllowlistIssue
        details : {
            connectionAllowlistIssueDetails : {
                error : MoreThanOneList
                request : {
                    requestId : <string>
                    url : https://devtools.test:8443/inspector-protocol/resources/connection-allowlist-test.php?enforced=(%22https://a.example%22),%20(%22https://b.example%22)
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
